interfaces.name: DocumentStatus
interfaces.signature: enum DocumentStatus { uploaded, processing, needs_review, extraction_failed, approved, exported, reopened }
interfaces.notes: Server-authoritative lifecycle state. Frontend must never derive or cache an alternate mode.

interfaces.name: FieldReason
interfaces.signature: enum FieldReason { low_confidence, missing_evidence, business_rule_mismatch, unknown_ship_to, stale_after_reprocess, manual_entry }
interfaces.notes: A field may carry more than one reason simultaneously; always an array.

interfaces.name: EvidenceRef
interfaces.signature: type EvidenceRef = { source_text: string | null; page_number: number | null; bbox: { x: number; y: number; width: number; height: number } | null }
interfaces.notes: bbox is a per-field progressive enhancement; never faked, never blocking.

interfaces.name: ExtractedField
interfaces.signature: type ExtractedField = { value: string | number | null; confidence: number | null; needs_review: boolean; reasons: FieldReason[]; evidence: EvidenceRef }
interfaces.notes: Canonical field payload for both header fields and line-item cells.

interfaces.name: LineItemPayload
interfaces.signature: type LineItemPayload = { id: string; line_number: FieldValue; material_code: FieldValue; description: FieldValue; quantity: FieldValue; uom: FieldValue; unit_price: FieldValue; line_total: FieldValue; requested_delivery_date: FieldValue; row_needs_review: boolean; row_reasons: FieldReason[] }
interfaces.notes: UI-editable line item contract inside ReviewDocumentPayload; id is stable for React keys/ARIA grid nav.

interfaces.name: ShipToCandidate
interfaces.signature: type ShipToCandidate = { catalog_id: string; ship_to_id: string; customer_name: string; normalized_address: string; confidence: number; reason: string; matched_attributes: string[] }
interfaces.notes: Top match and alternates must be explainable, not just scored.

interfaces.name: ShipToResolution
interfaces.signature: type ShipToResolution = { status: 'matched' | 'ambiguous' | 'no_match' | 'customer_unknown'; resolved_method: 'matched' | 'manual' | 'created' | null; selected_ship_to_id: string | null; best_match: ShipToMatchCandidate | null; alternates: ShipToMatchCandidate[]; extracted_address: string | null }
interfaces.notes: Drives the Ship To scorecard and export gating; distinguishes customer_unknown from no_match per detailed_discussion.

interfaces.name: ReviewDocumentPayload
interfaces.signature: type ReviewDocumentPayload = { document_id: string; status: DocumentStatus; original_filename: string; customer_name: string | null; po_number: string | null; page_count: number; header_fields: Record<string, FieldValue>; line_items: LineItemPayload[]; ship_to_resolution: ShipToResolution; totals_summary: { extracted_subtotal: number | null; extracted_tax: number | null; extracted_total: number | null; computed_line_total: number | null; mismatch: boolean }; raw_ocr_available: boolean; raw_json_available: boolean; latest_extraction_run_id: string | null; latest_correction_id: string | null; approved_correction_id: string | null; stale_corrections: boolean; last_error_code: string | null; last_error_message: string | null }
interfaces.notes: THE canonical single bundled response for GET /api/documents/{id}, assembled server-side from Document+ExtractionResult+CorrectedResult so Review.tsx never waterfalls fetches. Covers needs_review, extraction_failed, approved, reopened rendering.

interfaces.name: DocumentListItem
interfaces.signature: type DocumentListItem = { document_id: string; original_filename: string; status: DocumentStatus; customer_name: string | null; po_number: string | null; uploaded_at: string; updated_at: string; aggregate_confidence: number | null; duplicate_hint: boolean; processing_step: string | null; processing_progress_label: string | null; last_error_message: string | null }
interfaces.notes: Queue list row; processing labels may be null when the pipeline-narration enhancement is unavailable and the static fallback badge is used.

interfaces.name: DashboardSummary
interfaces.signature: type DashboardSummary = { uploaded_count: number; processing_count: number; needs_review_count: number; extraction_failed_count: number; approved_count: number; exported_count: number; average_confidence: number | null; success_rate: number | null; attention_document_ids: string[] }
interfaces.notes: Computed live from the DB on every call, never cached/estimated.

interfaces.name: CorrectionPatch
interfaces.signature: type CorrectionPatch = { header_fields: Record<string, { value: string | number | null }>; line_items: Array<{ id: string; fields: Record<string, { value: string | number | null }> }>; ship_to_selection: { selected_ship_to_id: string | null; create_new_catalog_entry: boolean } | null }
interfaces.notes: Explicit draft-save payload; no silent autosave implied anywhere in the flow.

interfaces.name: PromptConfig
interfaces.signature: class PromptConfig(BaseModel): id: str; scope: Literal['global','customer']; customer_name: str | None; mode: Literal['replace','supplement'] | None; prompt_text: str; is_active: bool; created_at: datetime; updated_at: datetime
interfaces.notes: mode only meaningful when scope='customer'.

interfaces.name: ShipToCatalogRecord
interfaces.signature: type ShipToCatalogRecord = { id: string; customer_name: string; ship_to_id: string; address1: string; address2: string | null; city: string; region: string | null; postal_code: string | null; country: string; aliases: string[]; last_matched_at: string | null }
interfaces.notes: Catalog CRUD contract.

interfaces.name: DocumentProcessingService
interfaces.signature: class DocumentProcessingService(Protocol): async def enqueue(document_id: str) -> None; async def reprocess(document_id: str, prompt_config_id: str | None = None) -> None; async def reconcile_stale_processing(now_utc: datetime) -> int
interfaces.notes: Owns background pipeline and stale-processing recovery.

interfaces.name: NeedsReviewEvaluator
interfaces.signature: def evaluate_needs_review(normalized_payload: dict, confidence_threshold: float) -> tuple[dict, list[str]]
interfaces.notes: Applies confidence, missing-evidence, and business-rule checks; returns annotated payload plus document-level flags.

interfaces.name: ShipToMatcher
interfaces.signature: class ShipToMatcher(Protocol): def match(customer_name: str | None, extracted_address: str | None) -> ShipToResolution
interfaces.notes: Must produce deterministic reason strings and alternates.

interfaces.name: StorageManager
interfaces.signature:
class StorageManager(Protocol):
    def save_original(self, document_id: str, filename: str, content: bytes) -> str: ...
    def save_page_image(self, document_id: str, page_number: int, content: bytes) -> str: ...
    def save_artifact(self, document_id: str, kind: str, filename: str, content: bytes) -> str: ...
    def delete_document_bundle(self, document_id: str) -> None: ...
interfaces.notes: Abstracts local filesystem layout for PDFs, page images, raw payloads, exports.

interfaces.name: GET /api/documents
interfaces.signature: ?status=&search=&customer=&sort=attention|recency|filename -> 200 { documents: DocumentListItem[] }
interfaces.notes: Default sort is attention-priority per design_handoff.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents
interfaces.signature: multipart/form-data files[] -> 201 { accepted: string[]; rejected: Array<{ filename: string; reason: string }> }
interfaces.notes: Batch upload with visible per-file rejection (password-protected, non-PDF, corrupt).

interfaces.name: GET /api/documents/{document_id}
interfaces.signature: GET /api/documents/{document_id} -> ReviewDocumentPayload
interfaces.notes: Primary review payload endpoint.

interfaces.name: PATCH /api/documents/{document_id}/correction
interfaces.signature: PATCH /api/documents/{document_id}/correction body CorrectionPatch -> ReviewDocumentPayload
interfaces.notes: Explicit draft save; returns fresh server-authoritative status and payload.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents/{document_id}/reprocess
interfaces.signature: POST /api/documents/{document_id}/reprocess body { prompt_config_id?: string } -> { document_id: string; status: DocumentStatus }
interfaces.notes: Creates new extraction run, preserves prior corrections.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents/{document_id}/approve
interfaces.signature: POST /api/documents/{document_id}/approve -> { document_id: string; status: DocumentStatus; approved_correction_id: string }
interfaces.notes: Approval freezes current corrected snapshot.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents/{document_id}/reopen
interfaces.signature: POST /api/documents/{document_id}/reopen -> { document_id: string; status: DocumentStatus; latest_correction_id: string }
interfaces.notes: Required to edit an approved/exported document again.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents/{document_id}/export
interfaces.signature: POST /api/documents/{document_id}/export body { format: 'json' | 'csv' } -> { document_id: string; status: DocumentStatus; download_path: string }
interfaces.notes: Allowed only from approved state; export failure must not revoke approval.

interfaces.name: GET /api/dashboard
interfaces.signature: -> 200 DashboardSummary
interfaces.notes: Computed live from the DB on each call.

interfaces.name: GET /api/prompts
interfaces.signature: -> 200 { prompts: PromptConfig[] }
interfaces.notes: Lists global and customer-specific prompt configs.

interfaces.name: PUT /api/prompts/{prompt_id}
interfaces.signature: body PromptConfig -> 200 PromptConfig
interfaces.notes: Prompt save path for settings UI.

interfaces.name: GET /api/ship-to
interfaces.signature: ?search=&customer= -> 200 { records: ShipToRecord[] }
interfaces.notes: Catalog table listing and search.

interfaces.name: POST /api/ship-to
interfaces.signature: body ShipToRecord -> 201 ShipToRecord
interfaces.notes: Create new catalog entry, including inline create-from-review flow.

interfaces.name: PATCH /api/ship-to/{catalog_id}
interfaces.signature: body Partial<ShipToRecord> -> 200 ShipToRecord
interfaces.notes: Catalog edit path, used by the same inline sheet component as Review's create flow.

interfaces.name: FieldValue
interfaces.signature: type FieldValue = { value: string | number | null; confidence: number; needs_review: boolean; reasons: FieldReason[]; evidence: EvidenceRef }
interfaces.notes: Canonical envelope for every header and line-item field, both in DB storage and API payloads. Also referred to as ExtractedField in UI contexts — same shape.

interfaces.name: FieldValueTS
interfaces.signature: interface FieldValue<T = string | number | null> { value: T; confidence: number; source_text: string | null; page_number: number | null; needs_review: boolean; review_reason: string | null }
interfaces.notes: TS mirror of FieldValue; lives in src/types/fieldValue.ts

interfaces.name: Document
interfaces.signature: class Document(BaseModel): id: str; filename: str; status: DocumentStatus; customer_name: str | None; po_number: str | None; uploaded_at: datetime; updated_at: datetime; page_count: int; duplicate_of_id: str | None; processing_started_at: datetime | None; current_extraction_result_id: str | None
interfaces.notes: backend/app/models/document.py

interfaces.name: Page
interfaces.signature: class Page(BaseModel): id: str; document_id: str; page_number: int; image_path: str; rotation: int; width: int; height: int
interfaces.notes: backend/app/models/page.py

interfaces.name: OcrResult
interfaces.signature: class OcrResult(BaseModel): id: str; page_id: str; engine: str; raw_text: str; confidence: float; bbox_data: list[dict] | None; created_at: datetime
interfaces.notes: bbox_data null when provider doesn't return coordinates; consumers branch on presence.

interfaces.name: ExtractionResult
interfaces.signature: class ExtractionResult(BaseModel): id: str; document_id: str; run_number: int; prompt_config_id: str | None; status: Literal['success','failed']; header_fields: dict[str, FieldValue]; line_items: list[LineItem]; raw_model_output_1: str | None; raw_model_output_2: str | None; created_at: datetime
interfaces.notes: Append-only, never updated in place; run_number increments per document.

interfaces.name: LineItem
interfaces.signature: class LineItem(BaseModel): id: str; line_no: FieldValue; material_code: FieldValue; description: FieldValue; qty: FieldValue; uom: FieldValue; unit_price: FieldValue; line_total: FieldValue; requested_delivery_date: FieldValue
interfaces.notes: Persisted per extraction run inside ExtractionResult.line_items; corrected versions live in CorrectedResult.line_items.

interfaces.name: ShipToMatchCandidate
interfaces.signature: type ShipToMatchCandidate = { ship_to_id: string; confidence: number; matched_on: string[]; reason: string }
interfaces.notes: reason is generated deterministically from matched_on; tests assert on matched_on, not prose.

interfaces.name: CorrectedResult
interfaces.signature: class CorrectedResult(BaseModel): id: str; document_id: str; extraction_result_id: str; header_fields: dict[str, FieldValue]; line_items: list[LineItem]; ship_to_resolution: ShipToResolution | None; is_stale: bool; approved_at: datetime | None; exported_at: datetime | None; created_at: datetime; updated_at: datetime
interfaces.notes: is_stale computed at read time (extraction_result_id != document.current_extraction_result_id), never stored.

interfaces.name: ShipToRecord
interfaces.signature: class ShipToRecord(BaseModel): id: str; ship_to_id: str; customer_name: str; address_line1: str; address_line2: str | None; city: str; region: str | None; postal_code: str; country: str; aliases: list[str]; created_at: datetime; updated_at: datetime; last_matched_at: datetime | None
interfaces.notes: backend/app/models/ship_to_record.py; aliases as JSON array, the retention moat.

interfaces.name: AuditLogEntry
interfaces.signature: class AuditLogEntry(BaseModel): id: str; document_id: str | None; document_snapshot_label: str; event_type: str; event_detail: dict; created_at: datetime
interfaces.notes: Nullable document_id + denormalized label so entries survive the document delete cascade.

interfaces.name: OCRProvider
interfaces.signature:
class OCRProvider(Protocol):
    async def run(self, image_path: str) -> OcrResult: ...
interfaces.notes: MockOCRProvider and a real adapter both implement this; orchestrator depends only on the protocol.

interfaces.name: ExtractionProvider
interfaces.notes: Orchestrator owns the exactly-one-retry rule; provider just answers extract/repair calls.

interfaces.name: compute_needs_review
interfaces.signature: def compute_needs_review(field: FieldValue, business_rule_violation: bool, confidence_threshold: float) -> FieldValue
interfaces.notes: Pure function combining the three layers (threshold, missing/mismatched source_text, business-rule override); unit-tested against the subtotal+tax≠total fixture.

interfaces.name: match_ship_to
interfaces.signature: def match_ship_to(extracted_address: dict, customer_name: str | None, catalog: list[ShipToRecord]) -> ShipToResolution
interfaces.notes: Deterministic reason generation from matched_on; distinguishes customer_unknown vs no_match; returns resolved_method='manual' shape when nothing clears threshold.

interfaces.name: run_pipeline
interfaces.signature: async def run_pipeline(document_id: str, prompt_override: str | None = None) -> ExtractionResult
interfaces.notes: Orchestrates convert->ocr->extract->repair-once->needs_review; sole caller is the ProcessingQueue consumer to serialize SQLite writes.

interfaces.name: reset_stuck_processing
interfaces.signature: async def reset_stuck_processing(timeout_minutes: int = 10) -> list[str]
interfaces.notes: Periodic 60s-interval sweep from app startup; returns reset document ids for audit logging.

interfaces.name: GET /api/documents/{id}
interfaces.signature: -> 200 ReviewDocumentPayload
interfaces.notes: Single bundled fetch for the Review route, no waterfall.

interfaces.name: GET /api/documents/{id}/status
interfaces.signature: -> 200 { status: DocumentStatus; pipeline_step: string | null }
interfaces.notes: Lightweight polling target consumed by useDocumentStatusPolling.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents/{id}/reprocess
interfaces.signature: body { prompt_config_id?: string } -> 202 { document_id: string; status: DocumentStatus; extraction_result_id: string }
interfaces.notes: Creates a new ExtractionResult row; never mutates prior rows or corrected_results.

interfaces.name: PATCH /api/documents/{id}/corrections
interfaces.signature: { header_fields?: dict; line_items?: list; ship_to_resolution?: ShipToResolution } -> 200 CorrectedResult
interfaces.notes: Rejected with 409 if document.status is approved/exported without an explicit prior reopen.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents/{id}/approve
interfaces.signature: -> 200 { document_id: string; status: DocumentStatus; approved_correction_id: string } | 409 { blocking_fields: string[] }
interfaces.notes: Blocks approval while unresolved needs_review fields or unresolved ship_to remain.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents/{id}/export
interfaces.signature: ?format=json|csv -> 200 file stream | { download_path: string }
interfaces.notes: Only callable from approved state; export failure never revokes approval; recorded as an audit_log boundary event.

interfaces.name: POST /api/documents/{id}/reopen
interfaces.signature: body { reason: string } -> 200 { document_id: string; status: DocumentStatus; latest_correction_id: string }
interfaces.notes: Required explicit action before any further PATCH on an exported document; audit-logged.

interfaces.name: useDocumentStatusPolling
interfaces.signature: function useDocumentStatusPolling(documentIds: string[]): void
interfaces.notes: src/hooks/useDocumentStatusPolling.ts; polls only while ≥1 doc is uploaded/processing, invalidates TanStack Query cache on change, idles otherwise.

interfaces.name: useReviewDraft
interfaces.signature: function useReviewDraft(documentId: string): { draft: CorrectionPatch; isDirty: boolean; save: () => Promise<void>; discard: () => void }
interfaces.notes: src/hooks/useReviewDraft.ts; enforces no-silent-autosave, drives the unsaved-changes navigation guard.

interfaces.name: fetchDocumentDetail
interfaces.signature: async function fetchDocumentDetail(id: string): Promise<DocumentDetail>
interfaces.notes: src/api/documents.ts; sole data source for Review.tsx, status always read from response.document.status.

interfaces.name: ProcessingQueue
interfaces.signature:
class ProcessingQueue: queue: asyncio.Queue[str]
    async def enqueue(self, document_id: str) -> None: ...
    async def run_consumer(self) -> None: ...
interfaces.notes: backend/app/worker/queue.py; single consumer task, in-process only — satisfies the serialized-writer requirement without external broker infra.

interfaces.name: log_audit_event
interfaces.signature: def log_audit_event(document_id: str | None, event_type: str, detail: dict) -> AuditLogEntry
interfaces.notes: Called from every mutating endpoint and pipeline transition.

interfaces.name: fetchReviewDocument
interfaces.signature: async function fetchReviewDocument(id: string): Promise<ReviewDocumentPayload>
interfaces.notes: src/api/documents.ts; sole data source for Review.tsx; status always read from response.status.

interfaces.name: PATCH /api/documents/{id}/correction
interfaces.signature: body CorrectionPatch -> 200 ReviewDocumentPayload | 409 (if approved/exported without prior reopen)
interfaces.notes: Explicit draft save; returns fresh server-authoritative status and payload.
